Internal Counsel Memorandum — PT Arunika Pay Tbk — 29 May 2026
Re: Proposed acquisition of PT Samudra Kredit Nusantara; OJK disclosure plan; UU PDP compliance checkpoints
Attendees/contacts: Ms. Ratri Wibisono (Corporate Secretary), Mr. Guntur Prasetya (DPO), dpo@arunikapay.co.id
MNPI handling: The acquisition term sheet remains non-public and material; insiders are recorded on Insider List IL-03; IDX trading blackout is active; no MNPI has been shared outside need-to-know personnel.
OJK/IDX: Draft keterbukaan informasi for a material transaction is prepared; filing to the OJK e-Reporting portal will occur post-SPA signing; no premature public announcement is planned.
Employment onboarding: New-hire forms for fintech engineering collect only role-essential fields (minimisation) and omit optional family data by default under Policy DP-02.
Privacy events: DSAR from customer Ibu Sari Nirmala was closed on 20 May 2026 with access file delivered and identity verified; her marketing consent withdrawal is recorded and honored; erasure of marketing profiles has been completed.
Cross-border transfer: Export of limited hashed user IDs to Sempurna Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for anti-fraud analytics is approved under Data Export Approval DEA-2026-11; no transfers occur without a signed DPA referencing UU PDP cross-border requirements.
DPA schedules: Schedule 2 (Subprocessors) lists Sempurna Cloud Pte. Ltd. and Auriga Analytics Sdn. Bhd. (Malaysia), with contractual safeguards aligned to UU PDP principles on adequacy and onward transfer; assessments have been logged.
Retention: Payroll and board-committee minutes retained per Policy DP-07 (7 years); expired candidate CVs from the 2024 recruitment batch were purged on 15 April 2026.
Completed control statement: The legacy consent backlog from pre-IPO mobile apps has been fully remediated; there is no open deletion request older than 14 days.
Diligence data minimisation: Target’s employee roster was shared only in aggregate (headcount by band); no national ID numbers or bank details were exchanged during Phase 1.
Employment data transfers: Any cross-border HR data flow to the regional HRIS will commence only after employee consents are captured; as of today, no such transfer is in flight.
Action items: Board to approve SPA signing authority and OJK filing text; DPO to refresh onboarding privacy notice and retention appendix; inquiries to corporate.secretary@arunikapay.co.id.
